subtitle.ja: 左手の親指に糸をかけ、右手のひらを上にして糸を握ります。右手首を回して手の甲を上に向けます
subtitle.en: Place the string on the left thumb. With the right hand palm up, grasp the string, then turn the right wrist to bring the back of the hand uppermost.

subtitle.ja: 右手で握っている糸を左手の親指と人差し指の間を通して左手の甲側に渡し、左手の親指と人差し指の外側を通して左手のひら側に戻します
subtitle.en: With the right hand, carry the string between the left thumb and index finger to the back of the left hand, then bring it around the outside of the left thumb and index finger and return it to the palm side.

subtitle.ja: 右手の糸を引きます。左手の糸は親指から人差し指へ自然に移動します
subtitle.en: Pull the string with the right hand. The string on the left hand will naturally shift from the thumb to the index finger.

subtitle.ja: 同じ動作を繰り返すことで、左手の糸が小指まで移動します
subtitle.en: By repeating the same motion, the string on the left hand will move gradually until it reaches the little finger.

subtitle.ja: 右手の甲を上にして糸を握り、右手首を回して手のひらを上に向けます
subtitle.en: With the back of the right hand uppermost, grasp the string, then turn the right wrist to bring the palm uppermost.

subtitle.ja: 右手で握っている糸を、左手の薬指と小指の間を通して左手の甲側に渡し、左手の薬指と小指の外側を通して右手を引きます。左手の糸は薬指に移動します
subtitle.en: With the right hand, carry the string between the left ring and little fingers to the back of the left hand, then bring it around the outside of those fingers and pull with the right hand. The string on the left hand will shift to the ring finger.

subtitle.ja: 同じ動作を繰り返すことで、左手の糸が親指まで移動します
subtitle.en: By repeating the same motion, the string on the left hand will move gradually until it reaches the thumb.
